creator: danger@FreeBSD.org
text:
When running munin-cron I am getting this warning from munin-graph:

(process:24908): Pango-WARNING **: Cannot open "/usr/local/lib/pango/1.6.0/modules/pango-basic-fc.so"


I do not know why it is looking to lib/pango/1.6.0 when the file lives in lib/pango/1.8.0 instead

I am not sure if this is a problem of x11-toolkits/pango or rrdtool.
